skills.description: Detects and fixes AI writing patterns (AI-isms) that make text sound machine-generated, covering 21 pattern categories with a 43-entry word/phrase replacement table.
trigger_conditions: make content sound less like AI
auditing content drafted with AI before publishing

skills.description: Explains concepts using Socratic-style dialogue, guiding users toward understanding through reflective reasoning and analogies.
trigger_conditions: user asks to explain a concept
user asks to teach how something works
user asks for help understanding a technical idea
anti_triggers: user asks for quick definitions and troubleshooting

skills.description: Expert guidance in crafting effective prompts for LLMs through advanced techniques including constitutional AI, chain-of-thought reasoning, and model-specific optimization.
trigger_conditions: Working on prompt optimization tasks or workflows
anti_triggers: Task is unrelated to prompt optimization
Need a different domain or tool outside this scope
